CustomField.description: Internal engine field. Stores pipe-delimited 6-character prefixes of each ancestor ID as a fast pre-screen index. The engine checks this index before running the expensive full Ancestor_Path__c string search. A match here triggers the conclusive full-string confirmation; no match skips it entirely. Only consulted by the cycle detection engine. Do not edit manually. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomField.label: Cycle Detection Index
